name: Kotak Royale Signature Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5X Reward Points on travel and dining spends
2 Reward Points per ₹150 on all other purchases

additionalBenefits: Exclusive partner offers on travel and lifestyle brands
pros: Good lounge access with 8 domestic + 2 international visits
5X rewards on travel and dining categories
cons: Point value is low at ₹0.25 per point
Annual fee of ₹2,999 requires decent spend to justify
Limited international lounge visits compared to competitors
Base earn rate could be better for this tier
idealFor: Frequent travellers and diners looking for a premium Kotak card
Users who want lounge access without a super-premium fee

faqs.question: How many lounge visits do I get?
faqs.answer: You get 8 complimentary domestic lounge visits and 2 international lounge visits per year via Visa Signature / Dreamfolks.

faqs.question: Can I convert points to air miles?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kotak Reward Points can be converted to select airline miles through the rewards portal, though the conversion ratio varies.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹2,999 annual fee is waived on spending ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year.
